correction_contract.point_operation_order: yaw about the I origin first, then translation expressed in nominal I axes
correction_contract.side: Delta_I left-multiplies nominal T_I_P inside frame I

excluded_checks: robot, gripper, part, PCB, fixture, and other-arm collision
jaw aperture actuation and pad contact
insertion force, friction, compliance, and uncertainty

frame_contract.correction_frame: I; bounds are recorded but not swept by this query
frame_contract.grasp: T_P_E maps E into connector frame P

warnings: Composed targets are transform arithmetic only, not executable poses.
The connector phase-1 library uses provisional gripper/TCP assumptions.
The finite sampled library is not complete over the continuous grasp family.

world_frame.calibration_source: query_example.yaml nominal board pose; replace with measured calibration
